# Anton Antonov's mindspace

> Engineering Manager & Principal Software Engineer. Writing about Go, Kubernetes, platform engineering, and distributed systems.

- Homepage: https://syndbg.github.io/
- RSS: https://syndbg.github.io/index.xml

## Posts

- [Writing a Kubernetes CSI Driver: Controller and Node from Scratch](https://syndbg.github.io/posts/2026-04-24-writing-a-kubernetes-csi-driver/) — A complete guide to building a Kubernetes CSI driver in Go — covering the CSI spec, IdentityService, ControllerService, NodeService, sidecar containers, and the full volume lifecycle.

- [Practically, Go 1.25's Container-Aware GOMAXPROCS: What You Need to Know](https://syndbg.github.io/posts/2025-01-13-go-1-25/) — Go 1.25 introduces container-aware GOMAXPROCS that automatically respects CPU limits in containerized environments. Learn how this changes everything for Kubernetes, Docker, and cloud deployments.
